prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, generate variants of RNA-directed RNA polymerase catalytic subunit (PB1) (viral RNA-dependent RNA polymerase) from Influenza A virus (A/Puerto Rico/8/1934(H1N1)) with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. specify a computational protocol covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using RoseTTAFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: RNA-directed RNA polymerase catalytic subunit (PB1); organism: Influenza A virus (A/Puerto Rico/8/1934(H1N1)); catalogue version v1.0
